config.seed_text: A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: As its mission moved forward to establish civilization on Mars, scientists became interested more than ever about what would happen if humans arrived at Earth within three billion years (Mars is now home planet). With no way out for mankind's future but through colonization, there never really seemed a path—until researchers discovered another mechanism that might help us return back safely or sustainably today! Our past history could not possibly change when we landed our first colonists so close to their homeland.... A small group of human explorers made contact across ancient Mesopotamia near where people live daily... But they didn't know much before heading inland; some came overland… They saw

TEXT:
A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy. As its mission moved forward to establish civilization on Mars, scientists became interested more than ever about what would happen if humans arrived at Earth within three billion years (Mars is now home planet). With no way out for mankind's future but through colonization, there never really seemed a path—until researchers discovered another mechanism that might help us return back safely or sustainably today! Our past history could not possibly change when we landed our first colonists so close to their homeland.... A small group of human explorers made contact across ancient Mesopotamia near where people live daily... But they didn't know much before heading inland; some came overland… They saw
